title: Anti-Pattern Detection Engine (Node.js)
constants: SAFE_TAGS: Set<string> — HTML tags excluded from most checks (blockquote, nav, a, input, span, etc.)
BORDER_SAFE_TAGS: Set<string> — SAFE_TAGS minus 'label' (for side-tab/border-accent rules)
OVERUSED_FONTS: Set<string> — inter, roboto, open sans, lato, montserrat, arial, helvetica
GENERIC_FONTS: Set<string> — serif, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, etc.
ANTIPATTERNS: Antipattern[] — 13+ descriptors (side-tab, overused-font, gradient-text, ai-color-palette, nested-cards, bounce-easing, dark-glow, etc.)
BRAND_FONT_DOMAINS: Record<string,string[]> — roboto/google-sans allowed on google domains
SKIP_DIRS: Set<string> — node_modules, .git, dist, build, .next, .nuxt, etc.
FRAMEWORK_CONFIGS: FrameworkConfig[] — Next.js, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Vite, Astro, Angular, Remix
REGEX_MATCHERS: Array<{id,regex,test,fmt}> — inline regex rules for CSS/JSX/Tailwind patterns
REGEX_ANALYZERS: Array<Function(content,filePath)>  — page-level regex analysis functions

classes.name: DetectionModule (detect-antipatterns.mjs)
classes.type: ES Module (no class keyword — functional style)

key_relationships: detectCli(main) depends_on detectUrl — URL targets
detectCli(main) depends_on detectHtml — .html/.htm file targets
detectCli(main) depends_on detectText — non-HTML file targets
detectCli(main) depends_on handleStdin — stdin input
detectCli(main) depends_on walkDir — directory traversal
detectCli(main) depends_on buildImportGraph — multi-file import context
detectCli(main) depends_on detectFrameworkConfig — dev server hint
detectCli(main) depends_on isPortListening — dev server probe
detectCli(main) depends_on formatFindings — output rendering
detectHtml depends_on buildBorderOverrideMap — jsdom var() fix
detectHtml depends_on checkElementBorders — element-level border scan
detectHtml depends_on checkElementColors — element-level color scan
detectHtml depends_on checkElementGlow — element-level glow scan
detectHtml depends_on checkElementMotion — element-level motion scan
detectHtml depends_on checkElementIconTile — icon-tile scan
detectHtml depends_on checkElementQuality — quality scan
detectHtml depends_on checkPageTypography — page-level font analysis
detectHtml depends_on checkPageLayout — page-level layout analysis
detectHtml depends_on checkPageQualityFromDoc — page-level quality
detectHtml depends_on checkHtmlPatterns — raw HTML regex checks
detectHtml depends_on finding — wraps raw {id,snippet} into Finding objects
detectHtml depends_on isFullPage — skips page-level checks for partials
detectUrl depends_on puppeteer (dynamic import) — browser launch
detectText depends_on runRegexMatchers — regex pattern matching
detectText depends_on extractStyleBlocks — Vue/Svelte style extraction
detectText depends_on extractCSSinJS — CSS-in-JS template literal extraction
detectText depends_on REGEX_ANALYZERS — page-level regex analyzers
checkElementBorders depends_on checkBorders — core border logic
checkElementBorders reads BORDER_SAFE_TAGS — tag exclusion
checkElementColors depends_on checkColors
checkElementColors depends_on resolveBackground
checkElementColors depends_on isNeutralColor
checkBorders / checkColors / checkGlow depend_on color utilities (parseRgb, hasChroma, isNeutralColor, relativeLuminance, contrastRatio)
finding depends_on getAP — looks up ANTIPATTERNS array
getAP reads ANTIPATTERNS constant
buildBorderOverrideMap reads document.styleSheets — CSS rule traversal
buildImportGraph depends_on resolveImport
walkDir reads SKIP_DIRS + SCANNABLE_EXTENSIONS
call_chains: CLI scan file: detectCli → walkDir → detectHtml(file) → [buildBorderOverrideMap, DOM querySelectorAll loop → checkElement*()] → checkPage*() → finding() → formatFindings()
CLI scan URL: detectCli → detectUrl → puppeteer.launch → page.evaluate(browserScript) → window.impeccableScan() → finding() → formatFindings()
CLI scan non-HTML: detectCli → walkDir → detectText → runRegexMatchers(REGEX_MATCHERS) + extractStyleBlocks + REGEX_ANALYZERS → dedup → formatFindings()
CLI stdin: detectCli → handleStdin → detectHtml or detectText → formatFindings()

Border check (DOM path): detectHtml → checkElementBorders(tag, style, overrides) → checkBorders(tag, widths, colors, radius) → isNeutralColor/hasChroma → returns [{id:'side-tab'|'border-accent-on-rounded', snippet}]
Typography check (DOM path): detectHtml → checkPageTypography(doc, win) → resolveFontSizePx per element → detects overused-font / single-font / flat-type-hierarchy
Import graph annotation: detectCli → buildImportGraph(files) → resolveImport → reverseMap → annotate findings with importedBy[]

detection_strategies.HTML_files: jsdom DOM traversal + computed styles (checkElement* per element + checkPage* for full pages)
detection_strategies.URLs: Puppeteer headless browser + injected browser detection script (window.impeccableScan())
detection_strategies.CSS_JSX_TS_etc: Regex matchers (REGEX_MATCHERS) + style block extraction + REGEX_ANALYZERS

important_notes: Single universal .mjs file — conditionally adapts for Node vs Browser via IS_BROWSER/IS_NODE
Browser strip markers: @browser-strip-start / @browser-strip-end omit Node-only code in browser build
main() exported as detectCli; liveCli() is a separate live-server command
No runChecks or scanFile/scanUrl exports — these concepts map to detectHtml/detectUrl internally
buildBorderOverrideMap compensates for jsdom CSSOM bug: drops border shorthand with var() references
Import graph adds importedBy[] context to findings (multi-file awareness)
BORDER_SAFE_TAGS differs from SAFE_TAGS only by excluding 'label' to catch card-shaped clickable labels
